recommendations.title: Colors of Evil: Red
recommendations.overview: When a girl's body is found on a beach in Poland's Tricity, a prosecutor teams up with the victim's mother on an impassioned quest for the truth.

recommendations.title: Reptile
recommendations.overview: Following the brutal murder of a young real estate agent, a hardened detective attempts to uncover the truth in a case where nothing is as it seems, and by doing so dismantles the illusions in his own life.

recommendations.title: Haseen Dillruba
recommendations.overview: Under investigation as a suspect in her husband's murder, a wife reveals details of their thorny marriage that seem to only further blur the truth.

recommendations.title: 10 Days of a Bad Man
recommendations.overview: Battered, broken and bereaved, a private investigator must muscle his way through a tangle of lies to uncover the truth behind a mansion murder.

recommendations.title: The Looming Storm
recommendations.overview: Yu, a self-assured factory guard, fancies himself a detective and begins poking his nose into a murder investigation.

recommendations.title: Gods
recommendations.overview: Set in communist Poland of the 80s the movie depicts early career of cardio surgeon Zbigniew Religa.

recommendations.title: Boston Strangler
recommendations.overview: Reporters Loretta McLaughlin and Jean Cole bravely pursue the story of the Boston Strangler at great personal risk, putting their own lives on the line in their quest to uncover the truth.

recommendations.title: Te3n
recommendations.overview: A grandfather, police officer and a priest join hands to investigate and find a missing child.

recommendations.title: Affliction
recommendations.overview: A small town policeman must investigate a suspicious hunting accident. The investigation and other events result in him slowly disintegrating mentally.

recommendations.title: In the Valley of Elah
recommendations.overview: A career officer and his wife work with a police detective to uncover the truth behind their son's disappearance following his return from a tour of duty in Iraq.
